## Summary

Describe the change in a few sentences.

## Why this change is needed

Explain the operator, security, reliability, or documentation reason for the change.

## Scope

- [ ] docs only
- [ ] config examples or templates
- [ ] install or render tooling
- [ ] phase apply or verify logic
- [ ] qemu or lab workflow
- [ ] monitoring, backup, or maintenance
- [ ] network exposure or dns path

## Files or areas changed

List the main files, directories, or phases affected.

## Validation performed

- [ ] syntax or lint checks
- [ ] dry run or staged render check
- [ ] docs walkthrough
- [ ] qemu validation
- [ ] host-side validation
- [ ] not fully tested, explained below

Describe the validation steps and results.

## Security and public-safe review

Confirm the following before requesting review:

- [ ] no real secrets, private keys, PATs, or API tokens were added
- [ ] no live production hostnames, addresses, or private evidence were added without explicit reason
- [ ] generated artifacts are intentional and sanitized
- [ ] docs were updated if install, verify, recovery, or operations behavior changed
- [ ] the public and private repository boundary remains clear

## Risks or follow-up

Note any remaining risks, known limitations, or next steps.
